parameters.query:
SELECT
  p.id,
  p.slug,
  p.name,
  p.description_de,
  p.category_id,
  pc.name_de AS category_name,
  p.city_id,
  c.name_de AS city_name,
  p.address_line_1,
  p.postal_code,
  p.latitude,
  p.longitude,
  p.phone,
  p.website_url,
  p.created_at,
  p.updated_at,
  p.ai_last_checked_at
FROM places p
LEFT JOIN cities c ON c.id = p.city_id
LEFT JOIN place_categories pc ON pc.id = p.category_id
WHERE (
  p.ai_last_checked_at IS NULL
  OR p.updated_at > p.ai_last_checked_at
)
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
LIMIT 100;

INSERT INTO ai_quality_checks (
  id,
  entity_type,
  entity_id,
  model_name,
  ai_status,
  confidence_score,
  reason_codes,
  explanation,
  suggested_action,
  raw_result_json,
  checked_at,
  created_at
)
VALUES (
  gen_random_uuid()::text,
  '{{ ($json.entity_type || "place").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.entity_id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.model_name || "unknown").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.ai_status || "UNSURE").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.confidence_score !== undefined ? $json.confidence_score : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.reason_codes_json ? "'" + $json.reason_codes_json.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::jsonb" : "'[]'::jsonb" }},
  {{ $json.explanation ? "'" + $json.explanation.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ ($json.suggested_action || "send_to_moderation").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.raw_result_json ? "'" + $json.raw_result_json.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::jsonb" : 'NULL' }},
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
RETURNING id, entity_type, entity_id, ai_status, confidence_score, checked_at;

UPDATE places
SET ai_review_status = '{{ ($json.ai_status || "UNSURE").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    ai_confidence_score = {{ $json.confidence_score !== undefined ? $json.confidence_score : 'NULL' }},
    ai_last_checked_at = NOW(),
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ ($json.entity_id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
RETURNING id, ai_review_status, ai_confidence_score, ai_last_checked_at;

SELECT
  p.id,
  p.name,
  p.ai_review_status,
  p.ai_confidence_score,
  p.ai_last_checked_at
FROM places p
WHERE p.ai_last_checked_at IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY p.ai_last_checked_at DESC
LIMIT 20;
